name: Tavily MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Tavily MCP server providing AI agents with an AI-optimized search API — returning structured, LLM-ready search results with source ranking, content extraction, and optional advanced research mode.
use_cases: Web search for current information in agent research workflows
News and market research from context-aware agents
Fact-checking and source verification via search from agents
Academic and technical research with Tavily's research-optimized index
RAG augmentation with current web information
not_for: Teams needing real-time data beyond Tavily's index freshness
best_when: An agent needs current web information beyond its training cutoff — Tavily's AI-optimized search returns structured, clean results ready for LLM consumption.
avoid_when: You need Google's exact index — Tavily's coverage, while good, differs from Google's.

auth.notes: Single API key via TAVILY_API_KEY. No scope granularity.

pricing.notes: Credit-based pricing. Free tier generous for development. Designed specifically for AI agent use cases.

performance.rate_limits: Free: 10 req/min; Paid: higher limits; documented

known_agent_gotchas: Search results may not include very recent content (< 24hr old)
Advanced research mode uses more credits per query
Result count limited — agents should not expect exhaustive coverage
Rate limit on free tier (10 req/min) restricts agent research throughput
Domain filtering can narrow results significantly — use carefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Simple API key auth without scopes. Newer company without prominent compliance certifications. Straightforward search — low data sensitivity concern.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Simple API key, no scopes. Limited compliance certifications. Low-risk use case (web search). Good developer security practices.
